protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of recombinant baculovirus clearance during rAAV production in Sf9 cells using a newly developed fluorescent-TCID50 assay
protocols.Evidence: A fluorescent-TCID50 assay was developed to determine the infectious titer of rBV-GFP stock.

protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of recombinant baculovirus clearance during rAAV production in Sf9 cells using a newly developed fluorescent-TCID50 assay
protocols.Evidence: Clarification: cell lysis, benzonase digestion; lysis and release of AAV vectors with Sarkosyl and Triton X-100.

protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of recombinant baculovirus clearance during rAAV production in Sf9 cells using a newly developed fluorescent-TCID50 assay
protocols.Evidence: Sf9 cell lysate generated by freeze-thaw was used as the cell lysate control.

protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of recombinant baculovirus clearance during rAAV production in Sf9 cells using a newly developed fluorescent-TCID50 assay
protocols.Evidence: Processed lysate was generated by lysis buffer containing both SLS and Triton X-100.

protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of recombinant baculovirus clearance during rAAV production in Sf9 cells using a newly developed fluorescent-TCID50 assay
protocols.Evidence: Cells were mechanically lysed by sonication without detergents or benzonase prior to filtration.

protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of recombinant baculovirus clearance during rAAV production in Sf9 cells using a newly developed fluorescent-TCID50 assay
protocols.Evidence: Centrifugal filter units were used for buffer exchange to remove toxic reagents before the F-TCID50 assay.

protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of recombinant baculovirus clearance during rAAV production in Sf9 cells using a newly developed fluorescent-TCID50 assay
protocols.Evidence: Kinetic study used reagents adopted for cell lysis and/or low pH hold, including SLS, Triton X-100, and mock lysate.

protocols.Paper_title: Evaluation of recombinant baculovirus clearance during rAAV production in Sf9 cells using a newly developed fluorescent-TCID50 assay
protocols.Evidence: Table summary lists “Lysis (Sarkosyl and Triton X-100)” and also “CsCl ultracentrifugation.”
